SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker

Class UpdateCheckEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
public class UpdateCheckEvent extends org.bukkit.event.Event
This event is called whenever an update check is finished. It contains information about the update check result, success, and the CommandSenders who requested it.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class org.bukkit.event.Event

    Returns the latest version string found by the UpdateChecker, or null if all previous checks have failed.

    Gets an array of all CommandSenders who have requested this update check.

    Gets the result of the update check, i.e., whether a new version is available or not.

    Checks whether the update check attempt was successful or failed.

    Gets the version string of the currently used plugin version.

  • Constructor Details

    • UpdateCheckEvent

      protected UpdateCheckEvent(UpdateCheckSuccess success, UpdateChecker checker)
      Constructs an UpdateCheckEvent with the given success status and associated UpdateChecker.
      Parameters:
      success - The UpdateCheckSuccess status indicating whether the update check was successful or failed.
      checker - The UpdateChecker instance that performed the update check.

  • Method Details

    • getChecker

      public UpdateChecker getChecker()
      Gets the UpdateChecker instance that performed the update check.
      Returns:
      The UpdateChecker instance that performed the update check.

    • getHandlerList

      public static org.bukkit.event.HandlerList getHandlerList()
      Returns the list of handlers for this event.
      Returns:
      The list of handlers for this event.

    • getHandlers

      @NotNull public @NotNull org.bukkit.event.HandlerList getHandlers()
      Specified by:
      getHandlers in class org.bukkit.event.Event

    • getLatestVersion

      public String getLatestVersion()
      Returns the latest version string found by the UpdateChecker, or null if all previous checks have failed.
      Returns:
      Latest version string found by the UpdateChecker, or null if no version was found.

    • getRequesters

      public org.bukkit.command.CommandSender[] getRequesters()
      Gets an array of all CommandSenders who have requested this update check. Normally, this will either be the ConsoleCommandSender or a player.
      Returns:
      Array of all CommandSenders who have requested this update check, or null if none.

    • setRequesters

      protected UpdateCheckEvent setRequesters(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender... requesters)
      Sets the CommandSenders who requested this update check.
      Parameters:
      requesters - CommandSenders who requested this update check.
      Returns:
      The current instance of UpdateCheckEvent for method chaining.

    • getResult

      public UpdateCheckResult getResult()
      Gets the result of the update check, i.e., whether a new version is available or not.
      Returns:
      The UpdateCheckResult indicating the result of the update check.

    • getSuccess

      public UpdateCheckSuccess getSuccess()
      Checks whether the update check attempt was successful or failed.
      Returns:
      The UpdateCheckSuccess status of this update check.

    • getUsedVersion

      public String getUsedVersion()
      Gets the version string of the currently used plugin version.
      Returns:
      The version string of the currently used plugin version.
